Item 1A. Risk Factors

The following risk factor updates supplement the risk factors disclosed in our most recent annual report on Form 10-K filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

Ongoing trade tensions and tariff measures affecting imports from China could materially increase our product costs and require us to absorb margin impact or raise consumer prices.

Our ability to maintain premium pricing depends on continued consumer perception of differentiated value in our hardware and software ecosystem relative to competing platforms and devices.

Item 3. Other Information
